calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, August 19, 2015, in Department 525:
Guadalupe Ornelas, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness/son Jovany Ornelas. Court assigned Spanish interpreter Carla Cuevas for Mr. Ornelas.
Robert P. Garcia, Esq. (415) 648-3060), specially appearance counsel for Appellant/Defendant Raul Vasquez who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn. Plaintiff/Respondent, Ornelas testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibit not marked - 3/2014 smog test (automotive repair)

Mr. Garcia submits Trial Memorandum of Raul Vasquez to the Court and a copy to respondent. Court assigned Spanish interpreter translates the Trial Memorandum to the respondent outside the courtroom before the hearing of this case.

Mr. Garcia examines Raul Vasquez and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibits not marked - sale date 4/27/2015 Liens, sale date 5/26/2015 Liens, and $1,000 payment receipt of 11/121/2014.

Mr. Garcia cross examines Mr. Ornelas and redirect examines Mr. Vasquez.

Court takes 15 minutes recess for parties to come to agreement on the case.

10: 55am - Court resumes, all parties, counsel, Court interpreter, and witness present.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. New evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Robert Aune; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-19-2015 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-19-2015 Judgment Entered
